T0273.title: Forced Group Add
T0273.definition: The act of forcibly adding users to a designated group or channel without their knowledge or consent through technical means.
T0273.description: Using scripts or plug-ins to bypass platform friend verification or invitation mechanisms, operators add a large number of users to groups in bulk. The added users are often unrelated to the group's theme, and the group is subsequently flooded with advertisements or scam messages. This tactic is commonly used for adult content redirection, gambling promotion, or financial scams to rapidly inflate member counts and create a false sense of activity.
